Home About Practices Events Announcements FAQ Run Tha City 517 Juneteenth 5K Contact Join Now

A Lansing running group created to bring people together through movement, representation, and community. We welcome runners of all levels.

Founded June 2022 by Ramon Brunson

Join the Movement

Our Story

Run Tha City 517 started in June 2022 and grew from a local conversation about Black runners in Lansing into a regular running community.

We believe running is for everyone, representation matters, and people moving together can strengthen the whole community.

What We're About

Representation Matters

Started from a conversation about Black runners in Lansing, we believe representation and visibility inspire participation.

Community First

More than running, we are building connections, accountability, and a supportive community.

All Levels Welcome

Whether you are training for your first 5K or you are a seasoned runner, you belong here.

Upcoming Group Runs

Join us for community runs. No membership required, just show up and run.

3 milesall levels

Saturday Community Run

A welcoming group run through Lansing for all paces.

Jul 10, 2026

8:00 AM

Benjamin Davis Park

2 milesbeginner

Beginner 5K Builder

An easy-paced meetup for runners and walkers building toward a 5K.

Jul 24, 2026

8:30 AM

Downtown Lansing

How to Join a Run

No membership, no fees, no barriers, just show up and run with us.

1

Check the Schedule

Join the group, meet new people, and move through Lansing at your own pace.

2

Show Up

Join the group, meet new people, and move through Lansing at your own pace.

3

Run Together

Join the group, meet new people, and move through Lansing at your own pace.

Connected to LATC

Run Tha City 517 and Lansing Area Track Club share a mission: building a stronger, healthier Lansing community through running and athletics.

Learn about LATC

Lansing Juneteenth 5K

Run Tha City 517 helps host the annual Lansing Juneteenth 5K Run/Walk/Roll at Benjamin Davis Park.

Learn about the 5K

Stay Connected

Follow for run announcements, route updates, and community highlights. Tag #RunThaCity517 to share your runs.

Get Connected View Announcements

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
